name: next2d-web-site
description: Next2D project provides a WebGL/WebGPU 2D rendering engine, animation tools for creating animations, and a framework to support team development.
author: Toshiyuki Ienaga<ienaga@next2d.app>

scripts.purge:css: purgecss --css node_modules/bootstrap/dist/css/bootstrap.min.css --content 'docs/**/*.html' 'public/assets/js/main.js' 'public/assets/js/contributors.min.js' --output public/assets/css/vendor && purgecss --css node_modules/bootstrap-icons/font/bootstrap-icons.min.css --content 'docs/**/*.html' 'public/assets/js/main.js' 'public/assets/js/contributors.min.js' --safelist bi-list bi-x --output public/assets/css/vendor
